name: Ragged Pasta with a Thousand Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped italian flat leaf parsley
2 teaspoons finely chopped fresh rosemary leaves
coarse salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
1 pound stracci (fresh egg pasta cut into 4 by 1-inch strips with a fluted pastry wheel)
2 medium size ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the herbs, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
2. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Add salt and stracci.
3. Cook, stirring frequently, until the stracci is al dente (tender yet firm), about 1-2 minutes.
4. Drain well.
5. Add the pasta to the bowl with the herb mixture and toss well.
6. Add the cheese and toss again.
7. Scatter the tomatoes over the pasta and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
